name: Swing365 Golf DC
about: Swing365 Golf DC offers a membership-based golf simulator experience in a private club atmosphere. The venue features state-of-the-art Full Swing™ simulators with infrared technology for precise ball tracking and a selection of 95+ global courses. Access is tied to a membership model, providing 24/7 booking for individual suites. The experience is designed for convenience and privacy, allowing golfers to play and practice on their own schedule. BYOB and food policies enhance the social and customizable nature of the visit, making it a flexible option for both solo practice and small group outings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing™ simulator technology with infrared tracking for realistic ball flight
24/7 access and online booking for ultimate convenience and flexibility
BYOB and food policy for a comfortable and customized experience
Wide selection of 95+ global courses for variety and playability

food_and_drink.notes: Bring your own food is allowed
Bring your own beverages is allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulator with infrared technology using 688 sensors across two tracks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has a BYOB/Food policy, allowing you to bring your own food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole simulation typically takes around 2-3 hours, but this can vary based on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue appears to cater to an adult, membership-based clientele with a private club atmosphere.
